entity.label: Beer
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the tribe of Judah to which Jotham fled for fear of Abimelech (Judg. 9:21). Some have identified this place with Beeroth.

nodes.label: Beer
nodes.description: A town in the tribe of Judah to which Jotham fled for fear of Abimelech (Judg. 9:21). Some have identified this place with Beeroth.

verses.text: And Jotham ran away, and fled, and went to Beer, and dwelt there, for fear of Abimelech his brother.
